hypotheses.evidence: the frequency null is equally consistent (0 contradictions) — consistency does not exceed the null
68% of anchors are the most-frequent member root → identity is mostly frequency
attachment IS frequency; reciprocity z=-10.368988, transitivity z=2.026653 — partly structural
concept clustering, proposition associations, and the SCC all exceed the null by 3-4x; the strongest surviving discovery is 'proposition_edges' (74.6564% structure)
hypotheses.hypothesis: irreducible structure remains after frequency control

verdict: genuine structure remains after frequency control (H1/H2/H3/H7 survive); consistency (H4) and identity (H5) are largely frequency; grammar (H6) is mixed. Monad is part frequency, part structure.
